MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff J.G. Devdhara is present and appearing in Pro Per.
Defendant Ronnie Decobb and Betty Washington are present and appearing with Limited Scope Attorney Ruth Desmond.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of September 17, 2012 is vacated.
